name: section_html_id
label: Section HTML ID
help_text: Unique anchor ID. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g. about-us-what-guides-us).

name: subtitle
label: Subtitle
default: Bringing Genius Together is more than a tagline. It reflects how Myridius works by uniting bold thinking, deep expertise, and human-centered execution to help organizations turn AI ambition into measurable impact. Our mission is to move ideas into action through intelligent systems, people-centered experiences, and modern engineering built for enterprise reality.

default.title: Openness
default.description: We lead with transparency and build trust.

items.text: Relationship intelligence turning transactions and cash flow data into meaningful conversations
Intelligent self-service resolving queries without escalation
Credit decisions from days to hours via EVOQ Underwriting Workbench for all borrowers

default.title: People First
default.description: We put people at the center of every solution.

items.text: Member intelligence turning life events into proactive, community-focused financial support
Automated member-service resolving common inquiries instantly to focus staff on high-value advice
Shared infrastructure orchestration enabling credit unions to compete with national banks through intelligent scale

default.title: Belonging
default.description: We create a respectful culture where everyone feels included.

items.text: Explainable credit decisioning with full Fair Lending compliance
Early warning signals on credits before they become NPLs
End-to-end digital origination with embedded document intelligence
